item.title: Microsoft’s open sourcing of 86-DOS and what it means 摘要
item.description:
On April 28, 2026, Microsoft unexpectedly open-sourced 86-DOS, the direct ancestor of PC DOS 1.0. This move sheds light on the early history and controversies surrounding MS-DOS and PC DOS, providing developers and historians with access to foundational code that shaped personal computing. The open-sourcing allows for deeper analysis of the origins of Microsoft's operating system lineage.
标签: Microsoft, 86-DOS, open source, PC DOS, MS-DOS, history, operating system, retro computing, software heritage

item.title: The shape of a guitar pick 摘要
item.description:
The author explores the contour plot of (log x)² + (log y)² = 1, which resembles a guitar pick shape. By rotating and scaling the equation with parameters k and r, they derive a mathematical model for the 351-style guitar pick. The aspect ratio is derived analytically as h/w = k × 2 sinh(r/√2)/(exp(r) − 1), allowing precise tuning. The post includes visual comparisons and notes on how r affects triangularity.
标签: mathematics, contour plot, guitar pick, geometry, logarithmic functions, curve fitting, visualization, Mathematica, aspect ratio, shape modeling
